node.title: Got 40/45 test cases passed for Uber OA

article.title: Got 40/45 test cases passed for Uber OA
article.content:
One problem is, during OA I got call from my mom. In middle, It switched the tab, will this effective my result, or flag the profile. 


Also will this is enough, as what i read across internet, people would have took, cheat and crack all the 45 testcases.

post.content: Topics from which Questions were asked ? Difficulty Level ?
Hey, only the test cases for 1 out of 2 questions ran for me, even though I attempted all 3 questions. I also have a referral\u2014will that give me any benefit? Do you happen to know the cutoff?
If you got any further updates, let me know \n

Most platforms just log it as a \u201Ctab change\u201D once, but they only care if it happens multiple times or looks sus (like switching every few mins). so be chill, nothing is guaranteed but don\'t loose hope either\n
Nothing is 100%... People like me didnt got call after solving all 3 questions :) Hope you get a call back
